final:
module zero_crossing_detector(
    input wire clk,
    input wire signal,
    output reg crossing
);

    reg previous_signal;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (previous_signal == 1 && signal == 0) begin
            crossing <= 1; // Positive to Negative
        end else if (previous_signal == 0 && signal == 1) begin
            crossing <= 0; // Negative to Positive
        end
        previous_signal <= signal;
    end
endmodule
